abilities.name: Doom
abilities.description: Critical strikes grant 5% extra Physical Attack for 2s.

abilities.name: Despair
abilities.description: Attacking enemy units with HP below 50% will increase Physical Attack by 25%.

abilities.name: Ambush
abilities.description: If no damage is dealt or taken for 5s, next Basic Attack deals extra Physical Damage equal to 60 + 40% Physical Attack and slows target by 40% for 1.5s.

abilities.name: Corrosion
abilities.description: Basic Attacks have 50% chance to slow enemy by 30% for 1.5s. Attacking slowed enemies grants 8% extra Attack Speed.

abilities.name: Engulf
abilities.description: Basic Attacks deal extra Physical Damage equal to 8% of the target's current HP (capped at 60 against minions).

abilities.name: Devour
abilities.description: Each Basic Attack recovers 10 (+4 x Hero Level) HP. Effect is halved against minions.

abilities.name: Divine Justice
abilities.description: After using a skill, next Basic Attack within 3s deals extra True Damage equal to 60% of Total Physical Attack and recovers 80 (+40% Total Physical Attack) HP. 1.5s cooldown.

abilities.name: Swift
abilities.description: Every 1% of Critical Chance is converted to 1% Attack Speed. Critical strikes cannot be dealt. Every 3rd Basic Attack triggers attack effects twice.

abilities.name: Bravery
abilities.description: After using skill, gain 15 Physical Attack and 5% Physical Penetration per stack (max 5). Lasts 3s.

abilities.name: Insanity
abilities.description: When HP drops below 50%, gain extra 15% Physical Lifesteal.

abilities.name: Retribution
abilities.description: After dealing damage to same target 5 times, gain 50% Movement Speed for 3s. 15s cooldown.

abilities.name: Armor Buster
abilities.description: Increases Physical Penetration by 35%.

abilities.name: Breaker
abilities.description: Each point of enemy Physical Defense grants 0.1% extra Physical Penetration (capped at 30%).

abilities.name: Lifeline
abilities.description: When HP drops below 30%, gain a shield absorbing 510-1350 damage for 3s. 40s cooldown.

abilities.name: Punish
abilities.description: Dealing damage to enemies with HP higher than 50% reduces their HP Regen by 50% for 3s.

abilities.name: Sky Piercer
abilities.description: After killing or assisting, restore 10% Max HP. Attacks deal extra adaptive damage.

abilities.name: Fighting Spirit
abilities.description: Dealing damage grants 9 Physical Attack and 3 Physical Penetration per stack (max 8). At full stacks gain 15% Movement Speed.

abilities.name: Wind Chant
abilities.description: Immune to all Physical Damage for 2s. 70s cooldown.

abilities.name: Typhoon
abilities.description: Every 5-2s the next Basic Attack hits up to 3 enemies dealing 150-362 Magic Damage.

abilities.name: Power Potion
abilities.description: Gain 15 Physical Attack and 10% Physical Penetration for 60s.

abilities.name: Frozen
abilities.description: Become frozen for 2s: immune to damage but unable to act.

abilities.name: Deter
abilities.description: When attacked, reduces attacker's Physical Attack by 10% for 2s (stacks up to 3 times).

abilities.name: Shield
abilities.description: Gain a shield every 10s that absorbs 170-1150 Magic Damage.

abilities.name: Black Ice
abilities.description: When taking damage, deal Magic Damage to nearby enemies equal to 1.5% of Max HP per second for 3s.

abilities.name: Vengeance
abilities.description: Deals 25% of opponent's Physical Attack as Physical Damage to attacker when hit by Basic Attack.

abilities.name: Brute Force
abilities.description: Using skills or Basic Attacks grants 2% Movement Speed and 4 Physical & Magic Defense per stack (max 5 stacks).

abilities.name: Chastise
abilities.description: After being hit by a Basic Attack, reduce attacker's Attack Speed by 30% and Movement Speed by 15% for 2s.

abilities.name: Burning Soul
abilities.description: Deals Magic Damage equal to 1.5% of Max HP per second to nearby enemies. Damage increased by 50% to minions.

abilities.name: Arctic Cold
abilities.description: Reduces Attack Speed of nearby enemies by 30% and Shield and HP Regen by 50%.

abilities.name: Recovery
abilities.description: Regenerates 1.5% of Max HP per second when not taking damage for 5s.

abilities.name: Immortal
abilities.description: Resurrect 2.5s after death with 16% HP and a shield absorbing 220-1200 damage. 210s cooldown.

abilities.name: Bless
abilities.description: Increases Shield absorption and HP Regen by 30%.

abilities.name: Demonize
abilities.description: When HP drops below 40%, reduces damage taken by 30% and gain 30% Spell Vamp for 5s. 50s cooldown.

abilities.name: Holy Blessing
abilities.description: Taking Magic Damage grants 3-10 Magic Defense per stack (max 6 stacks). Lasts 6s.

abilities.name: Thunderbolt
abilities.description: After using skill, next Basic Attack deals extra True Damage equal to 50 + 5% of Max HP to target and nearby enemies, slowing them by 40-80% for 1s.

abilities.name: Rock Potion
abilities.description: Gain 150 HP and 15 Physical & Magic Defense for 60s.

abilities.name: Nirvana
abilities.description: Gain a shield equal to 200% of Magic Power. Regenerates when out of combat.

abilities.name: Time
abilities.description: Gain 25 HP and 4 Magic Power every 20s (max 12 stacks). At max stacks gain 5% Magic Power and 300 Mana.

abilities.name: Recharge
abilities.description: Gain 10% Spell Vamp. Kill or assist restores 10% HP.

abilities.name: Spellbreaker
abilities.description: Each point of enemy Magic Defense increases Magic Penetration by 0.1%.

abilities.name: Mana Spring
abilities.description: Regen 15% Max Mana every 10s.

abilities.name: Affliction
abilities.description: Basic Attacks deal extra Magic Damage equal to 40% Magic Power.

abilities.name: Blessing
abilities.description: Dealing skill damage heals the most-injured nearby ally for 200 + 25% Magic Power. 6s cooldown.

abilities.name: Timestream
abilities.description: Kill or assist reduces Ultimate cooldown by 30%.

abilities.name: Magic
abilities.description: Dealing Magic Damage reduces target Magic Defense by 3-10 per stack (max 3 stacks).

abilities.name: Scorch
abilities.description: Skills burn target for 3s, dealing 1%/1.5%/2% of target's Max HP as Magic Damage per second.

abilities.name: Mystery
abilities.description: Increases Magic Power by 21-35%.

abilities.name: Ice Bound
abilities.description: Skills slow enemies by 15% for 3s (stacks up to 2 times).

abilities.name: Resonate
abilities.description: Every 6s, next skill deals extra Magic Damage equal to 150% Magic Power that bounces to up to 3 targets.

abilities.name: Star
abilities.description: After using skill, next Basic Attack deals extra 100 + 80% Magic Power as True Damage. 2.5s cooldown.

abilities.name: Elegance
abilities.description: Leveling up restores 10% HP and Mana.

abilities.name: Magic Potion
abilities.description: Gain 15 Magic Power and 10% Magic Penetration for 60s.

abilities.name: Exotic
abilities.description: After dealing damage, increases damage to same target by 4% (max 3 stacks). Different targets reset stacks.

abilities.name: Wish
abilities.description: Dealing skill damage to enemy hero restores 100 + 30% Magic Power HP to self and nearby most-injured ally.

abilities.name: Mysticism
abilities.description: Killing or assisting restores 10% Mana. Killing minions restores 4% Mana.

abilities.name: Side Effect
abilities.description: Movement Speed boost reduced by 40 when hit or dealing damage, recovering gradually over 5s.

abilities.name: Fortitude
abilities.description: Reduces CC duration by 30%.

abilities.name: Valor
abilities.description: Being hit by Basic Attack grants 5 Physical Defense (max 25) for 3s.

abilities.name: Bloody Retribution
abilities.description: Retribution heals for 10% of damage dealt to jungle monsters.

abilities.name: Flame Retribution
abilities.description: Retribution can be used on enemy heroes to deal True Damage and slow by 60% for 0.5s.

abilities.name: Ice Retribution
abilities.description: Retribution can be used on enemy heroes to deal True Damage and steal 10% Movement Speed for 3s.

abilities.name: Conceal
abilities.description: Become invisible with nearby allies for 5s. First attack out of concealment deals extra damage.

abilities.name: Dire Hit
abilities.description: Gain 20% extra damage for your team for 3s. 45s cooldown.

abilities.name: Encourage
abilities.description: Grant nearby allies 20% extra Attack Speed and 15% extra Movement Speed for 3s.

abilities.name: Favor
abilities.description: Heal nearby allies for 200 + 10% of their Max HP and restore 50 Mana.
